prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次分别为约1981名（2021年本科一批B段特殊类型）、73名、497名、61名、75名。2021年因含特殊批次位次异常偏高，20 22–2025年主流位次稳定在60–500名区间，2025年基准位次约75名。近3年位次波动幅度较大，但整体处于华五顶尖高校在内蒙古的正常录取区间；该校在内蒙古 物理类（原理科）招生计划：2021–2024年均为3人，2025年增至6人，2026年计划4人，较2025年缩招2人（-33.3%）。缩招意味着竞争名额减少，对位次有下移（更易 进）的拉动作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名（2021–2026年），属于全国顶尖高校阵营，对高 分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿量较高）及校园安全事件，可能对报考热度产生轻微压制；抖音综合热度排名 第42位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，未出现极端高热或明显降温信号；历史投档异常方面，2021年曾出现理科投档线在河南华五倒数第一的记录，但对内蒙古影响有限；上海交通大学拥有28个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、临床医学A+、生物学A+、工商管理A+、管理科学与工程A+ 等，学科实力居全国前列。物理类招生专业（人工智能、电子信息类等）均对应A/A+级学科，专业含金量极高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业在2024– 2026年专业热度分析中持续被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会关注度高、就业前景看好，进一步推高相关专业的报考竞争。内蒙古2026年普通高考考生总数约154000人，较2025年 （116360人）增长约32%，物理类考生估算约110800人，竞争基数显著扩大。；上海交通大学位于上海市，属一线城市高校 ，对全国考生均有强吸引力。该校在内蒙古招生规模较小（个位数），本地无特殊倾斜政策，跨省报考热度主要受学校层次和区位驱动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次75 名、2026年计划缩招33.3%（使位次数字减小）与内蒙古考生总数增长约32%（使竞争加剧）的双向对冲，以及学校声誉偏负面带来的轻微降温效应。在此 基础上考虑考生规模大幅扩张带来的竞争压力，适度上调至65名。预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约65名，波动区间57–73名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 1981st (2021, undergraduate batch 1B special type), 73rd, 497th, 61st, and 75th respectively. In 2021, due to special batches, the ranking was abnormally high; from 2022 to 2025, mainstream rankings stabilized in the 60–500 range, with a baseline ranking of about 75th in 2025. In recent three years, rankings fluctuated significantly but remained within the normal admission range for top Huawu universities in Inner Mongolia. The enrollment plan for Physics Category (former Science Category) at this university in Inner Mongolia: 3 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 6 in 2025, and planned 4 in 2026, a reduction of 2 students (-33.3%) compared to 2025. The reduction means fewer competitive slots, which tends to lower the ranking (making admission easier).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 4th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years (2021–2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring students. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (high retraction volume) and campus safety incidents, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, showing no extreme heat or cooling signals. In terms of historical admission anomalies, in 2021, its science admission line in Henan was the lowest among Huawu universities, but this has limited impact on Inner Mongolia. Shanghai Jiao Tong University has 28 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Clinical Medicine A+, Biology A+, Business Administration A+, and Management Science and Engineering A+, placing its academic strength at the forefront nationally. The Physics Category admission majors (such as Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, etc.) all correspond to A/A+ level disciplines, with extremely high major value.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors have been consistently rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social attention and promising employment prospects, further increasing competition for related majors. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, an increase of about 32% from 2025 (116,360), with an estimated 110,800 Physics Category students, significantly expanding the competitive base. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, strongly attracting students nationwide. Its enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is small (single digits), with no special local preferential policies, and cross-province application popularity is mainly driven by university level and location.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 75th, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 33.3% (which decreases the ranking number), and the 32% increase in total Inner Mongolia students (which intensifies competition), along with the slight cooling effect from the negative reputation, the prediction is adjusted upward to 65th. The predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 65th, with a fluctuation range of 57–73.

- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Elite Class).

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
None currently (Physics Category has only 4 admission majors, all top popular directions with minimal ranking differences; it is recommended to choose based on personal interest).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: All Physics Category admission majors at Shanghai Jiao Tong University in Inner Mongolia are top popular directions with minimal ranking differences (all at 75th in 2025). The predicted ranking of 65th falls within the range of 57–73. It is recommended that candidates with rankings below the lower limit of 57 can aim for Tier 1 majors; those around 65th should focus on Tier 2 majors; those near the upper limit of 73 should apply cautiously and consider other schools as backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 70, 80, 40, 45, and 28 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating upward trend (smaller ranking number = increased competition). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 28, the highest in the past five years. The university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia for History Category (former Liberal Arts): 3 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 2 in 2025, and only 1 planned for 2026, a reduction of 1 student (-50%) compared to 2025. The significant reduction in enrollment has a downward pull effect on rankings (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 4th nationally by Soft Science, belonging to the top-tier universities in China, with strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 42nd (relatively popular), with no extreme high heat or significant cooling signals. Shanghai Jiao Tong University's law discipline is rated A, foreign language and literature A+, business administration A+, and applied economics A, highly matching the History Category enrollment major (Law Experimental Class), with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The law major has been consistently rated as 'Recommended' or 'Divergent Watch' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social attention and divergent employment prospects, but overall still a popular liberal arts major. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is approximately 154,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, with an estimated 43,200 History Category candidates, significantly expanding the competition base. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, with strong appeal to liberal arts candidates nationwide. The university's enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia for History Category is extremely small (only 1 student in 2026), and scarcity further increases competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two-way offset of the 2025 baseline ranking of 28, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 50% (making the ranking number smaller), and the increase in total Inner Mongolia candidates by about 32% (intensifying competition). Given the sustained high social popularity of the law major, extreme scarcity of enrollment slots (only 1 student), and the significant expansion of the candidate pool, the ranking is moderately adjusted upward to 23. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 23, with a fluctuation range of 20–26.
